raw_consumer_statement: I reported to Citibank fraudulent charges on my credit card with other banking card was affected by the same merchant, XXXX XXXX. It started with XXXX XXXX online taking my Citibank credit card first after XXXX attempts they told me that it did not go through and asked if I had another credit card to be able to use so I use the my XXXX credit card after XXXX at merchant attempted to charge which was a combination of over {$8000.00}. I contacted XXXX XXXX only to be told I had to have an order number which I didnt have because I was unaware at the time all my cards were charged. I was then told by XXXX XXXX that agent that took my online order didnt go through the secure process. At that point, XXXX XXXX advised to Dispute with my bank, and that was the only thing that could be done because the transactions did not show in their system. I dispute with Citibank only to be told the merchant had valid proof but, they failed to send me that information. I asked how can it be valid XXXX didnt get the benefit and why I had to call you about getting what the merchant supposedly sent you. I terms Citibank wants me to pay for someone purchases if over {$1700.00}. Its not fair or right!
